series_metadata.series_description: This record shows current deposits made to the State Treasurer. The record shows source of receipts and total amount of deposit.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: 2 complete fiscal years current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than . ; Electronic: 2 complete fiscal years current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than
